query:
query locationsGeocode($input: String!, $locale: AllowedLocales) {
  locationsGeocode(input: $input, locale: $locale, inputType: PlaceId) {
    source
    id
    placeId
    types
    name
    address
    addressWithMeetingPoint
    businessDistrictId
    latitude
    longitude
    airportIata
    streetName
    streetNumber
    postalCode
    city
    neighborhood
    region
    countryCode
    country
    errors
    timezone
    businessDistrictName
    businessDistrictUnLocode
    __typename
  }
}
